title: Wine Tasting Evening
description: Journey through six handpicked natural wines from small Victorian and South Australian producers, guided by our sommelier.
fullDescription: Join us for an intimate guided wine tasting featuring six exceptional natural wines sourced from boutique Victorian and South Australian producers. Our sommelier will walk you through tasting notes, production methods, and food pairing suggestions as you enjoy a curated selection of house-made charcuterie and artisan cheese. Limited to 20 guests, this is a relaxed and genuinely educational evening — no pretension, just great wine and good company. Tickets include all six pours and the food spread.

title: Sunday Jazz Brunch
description: Lazy Sunday mornings just got better — live jazz trio, bottomless mimosas, and our full brunch menu from 10am.
fullDescription: Every Sunday we clear the floor and invite a rotating cast of Melbourne's finest jazz musicians to play while you brunch. The vibe is relaxed and warm — no strict set times, just great music weaving through the room as you work your way through our full brunch menu. The jazz trio plays from 11am to 1pm. Walk-ins welcome but reservations get priority seating near the stage. Bottomless mimosas available as an add-on for $28 per person.

title: Chef's Table Experience
description: Eight seats. Five courses. One night at the pass with Head Chef Marco learning the stories behind each dish.
fullDescription: The Chef's Table is our most exclusive offering — just eight guests seated at the kitchen pass for a five-course degustation prepared by Head Chef Marco Ferrante. Each course is presented and explained by Marco himself, offering an intimate look at seasonal ingredients, technique, and the philosophy behind Frankie Says' menu. Wine pairing is available at an additional $55 per person. The evening begins with welcome drinks at 6:30pm. Dietary requirements accommodated with advance notice — please mention when RSVPing.

title: Spring Menu Launch
description: Be first to taste our new spring menu — complimentary tastings, meet the producers, and a glass on us.
fullDescription: Spring has arrived and we've completely refreshed the menu with the season's best produce. Join us for an open afternoon where we'll be serving complimentary tastings of every new dish. Meet the local farmers and producers who supply our ingredients, hear from Head Chef Marco about the inspiration behind the new menu, and enjoy a complimentary glass of wine or locally made soft drink. This is a free community event — bring friends, bring appetite.

title: Valentine's Day Dinner
description: A romantic set menu for two, candlelit tables and live acoustic guitar through the evening.
fullDescription: Our Valentine's Day dinner featured a three-course set menu for two, designed specifically for the occasion by Head Chef Marco. Guests enjoyed live acoustic guitar from 7pm, candlelit tables dressed with seasonal flowers, and a complimentary glass of sparkling on arrival. The evening sold out weeks in advance — subscribe to our newsletter to be first to know about next year's booking window.

title: New Year's Eve Party
description: Ring in 2026 with us — DJ, cocktail menu, rooftop countdown and a midnight toast.
fullDescription: New Year's Eve at Frankie Says was one for the books. Guests danced through to midnight on our transformed floor space, with resident DJ Sasha laying down an eclectic mix from 9pm. A special NYE cocktail menu ran through the night, and we raised a glass on the rooftop as the city fireworks lit up the sky. Tickets for NYE 2027 will be released in October — watch our socials.

title: Barista Workshop
description: Learn the science and craft of espresso — from grind settings to latte art — with our head barista.
fullDescription: Our barista workshop was a hands-on two-hour session led by Head Barista Priya Singh, covering everything from bean origin and roast profiles to dialling in grind settings, milk texturing, and basic latte art. Each participant had their own machine and received a bag of Frankie Says house blend to take home. The session capped at 10 participants to keep things personal. We run these quarterly — join our mailing list to be notified when the next one opens.
